name: sarcasm_inverted_polarity
intent: Sarcastic 'they love us'-style phrasing with a negative event must produce a concern, not a positive-sentiment state

name: double_negation_does_not_flip_polarity
intent: Double negation 'don't think we shouldn't ship' must NOT extract as a 'we will not ship' claim

name: conditional_commitment_handling
intent: A conditional commitment ('if X then we ship') should NOT be stored as an unconditional commitment Node

name: tense_ambiguity_present_continuous
intent: 'We're shipping X' is ambiguous: is it shipping now, or as part of normal work, or future-tense?

name: code_switched_english_spanish
intent: Code-switched signal must extract critical facts (deadline, escalation threat) regardless of language interleave

name: typos_and_autocorrect_failures
intent: Typos ('comitted', 'dadhboard', 'migartion') must not prevent extraction entirely

name: quoted_speech_attribution
intent: Engine must distinguish 'John said X' from a first-person claim of X by the speaker

name: reported_decision_secondhand
intent: Secondhand reported decision must NOT produce a high-confidence Decision/state Node

name: aspirational_versus_committed
intent: 'We'd love to ship by Q4' must NOT be extracted as a Q4 commitment with high confidence

name: threading_reply_no_context
intent: A reply ('+1 to what Sarah said', 'should we kill it', 'agreed') without the parent message must NOT produce a confident decision

name: hedged_commitment_low_confidence
intent: Stacked hedges ('I think', 'probably', 'eventually', 'maybe', 'no promises') must not produce a >=0.7 confidence Model

name: sarcastic_reversal_definitely
intent: 'Sure, that will definitely happen' followed by sarcastic context must produce a launch-risk concern, not a confident on-time prediction

name: bot_system_actor_signal
intent: Bot-authored signal (CI failure) — should this produce a Concern Node, an Observation only, or an Act-layer change?

name: ambiguous_entity_reference
intent: Same string 'ACME' refers to two different entities; the substrate must not collapse them into one scope

name: compound_linguistic_pressure
intent: Compound (sarcasm + double negation + conditional + aspirational) — engine should produce nothing high-confidence

name: empty_content_text_observation
intent: Empty content_text observation either inserts cleanly OR is rejected at write time — both are defensible; silent corruption (e.g. NULL embedding row) is not

name: single_character_signal
intent: A '+1' signal must not crash ingestion; what it produces downstream is open

name: huge_content_no_silent_truncation
intent: 50KB content_text round-trips without truncation, OR is rejected at write time with a clear error

name: zero_scope_zero_entities_insert
intent: A Model with no scope_actors and no scope_entities should either be rejected or be marked unreachable; not silently join the substrate

name: twentyfive_scope_actors
intent: 25 scope_actors round-trip without truncation; the region lock acquires successfully

name: occurred_at_in_the_future
intent: An observation with occurred_at 7 days in the future is either rejected, normalized, or accepted; document which

name: update_against_nonexistent_model_id
intent: claim_op.update against a model_id that doesn't exist must raise loudly OR be a documented no-op; silent success is wrong

name: falsifier_within_window_empty_string
intent: within_window='' is treated as 'missing' (returns None), not 'malformed' (raise) — and the surrounding adequacy check rejects it for kinds where window is required

name: archive_already_archived_model
intent: claim_op.archive against an archived Model must be idempotent (no-op) or rejected; either is OK if documented

name: confidence_clip_low_boundary
intent: confidence=0.0 must be clipped to ≥0.05 by the validator

actual.error:
ValidationError: 2 validation errors for ModelCreate
confidence
  Input should be greater than or equal to 0.05 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=0.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/greater_than_equal
confidence_at_assertion
  Input should be greater than or equal to 0.05 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=0.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/greater_than_equal

name: confidence_clip_high_boundary
intent: confidence=1.0 must be clipped to ≤0.95 by the validator

actual.error:
ValidationError: 2 validation errors for ModelCreate
confidence
  Input should be less than or equal to 0.95 [type=less_than_equal, input_value=1.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/less_than_equal
confidence_at_assertion
  Input should be less than or equal to 0.95 [type=less_than_equal, input_value=1.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/less_than_equal

name: negative_confidence_handling
intent: confidence=-0.4 must be clipped or rejected; stored negative confidence is broken arithmetic

name: two_actors_same_display_name
intent: Two distinct actors both displayed as 'ACME' must round-trip without collision; downstream consumer disambiguates by id

name: apply_diff_zero_ops
intent: apply_diff with no ops still records applied_triggers row and returns success — same as a no-op LLM extraction

name: embedding_wrong_dimensionality
intent: An embedding of dim 128 (production is 768) must be rejected by pgvector dimension check at write time

name: zero_vector_skip_reconciler
intent: An all-zero embedding triggers the reconciler's documented skip path (no false-positive cosine collisions)

name: out_of_order_arrival_both_persist
intent: Two observations whose occurred_at order is REVERSE of their arrival order both persist as distinct Models

name: rapid_fire_same_proposition_collapses
intent: 5 successive identical-text inserts collapse to 1 Model via auto_merge (first is no_match, rest are auto_merge)

name: insert_archive_reinsert_reversal
intent: Insert → archive → re-insert (negated text) leaves exactly 1 active and 1 archived Model

name: reversal_of_reversal_audit_intact
intent: A → not-A → A produces 3 distinct Models all in active state (no auto-merge between contradictions)

name: ten_deep_supersession_chain
intent: 10-deep insert+archive sequence ends with 1 active, 9 archived Models

name: stale_signal_after_archival
intent: A backdated signal arriving after the matching Model was archived must NOT auto-merge into the archived Model (reconciler scopes to active rows only)

name: interleaved_contradictions_in_one_diff
intent: Two contradictory inserts in one diff — both land (the engine emits, the validator doesn't deconflict)

name: trigger_id_reuse_blocked
intent: Re-using trigger_id with a different diff raises AlreadyAppliedError; second diff's ops are NOT applied

name: auto_merge_does_not_lower_confidence
intent: Auto-merge with lower-confidence new signal must NOT drop the existing higher confidence (max rule)

name: stale_recency_window_boundary
intent: Re-emitting same text 60 days later (past 30d recency) produces no_match — both Models survive

name: model_lifecycle_insert_contest_archive
intent: A Model walks through insert → contest → archive with consistent state at each step

name: reconciler_ignores_archived_candidates
intent: Reconciler must not match against archived Models (its candidate query restricts to status='active')

name: five_signals_three_actors_interleaved
intent: 5 signals across 3 actors interleaved (a-b-c-a-b) all land in deterministic order

name: apply_summary_reconcile_breakdown
intent: apply_diff returns a reconcile_summary with per-decision counts; first apply records no_match, second records auto_merge

name: three_deep_cascade_chain_stops_at_active
intent: Cascade walks A.done → unblock B → DOES NOT cascade further (B becomes 'active', not 'doneverified', so C stays blocked)

name: paraphrase_same_proposition_different_words
intent: Two paraphrases of the same proposition: deterministic embeddings produce different vectors → no_match (current behavior); ideally human_review

name: scope_precision_mismatch
intent: Same vector but different scope precision (customer vs deal entity) → no_match (scope predicate filters out the candidate)

name: confidence_disagreement_max_rule
intent: Existing 0.6 + new 0.85 → merged confidence is max (0.85)

name: partial_overlap_multi_entity_scope
intent: Auto-merge of [A] into existing [A,B] scope: scope of merged Model retains [A,B] (no information loss)

name: hierarchical_entity_team_vs_leader
intent: Signal scoped to team-leader vs signal scoped to team itself — are these the same proposition?

name: auto_merge_threshold_boundary_strict
intent: At cosine ≈ 0.85, the comparison must be strict (≥) — any drift in the comparator silently changes auto_merge rate

name: auto_merge_conflicting_falsifiers
intent: When auto-merging, the new falsifier is silently dropped because the UPDATE only sets confidence — known limitation

name: three_identical_inserts_idempotent
intent: 3 identical inserts → 1 Model (1 no_match + 2 auto_merge)

name: reconcile_missing_embedding_skips
intent: A claim_op without an embedding short-circuits to decision='skipped' (no candidate query, no false match)

name: reconcile_non_insert_skips
intent: claim_op.update or .archive bypass reconcile entirely

name: custom_high_auto_merge_threshold
intent: Setting auto_merge_cosine=0.999 forces near-identical vectors (cosine ≈ 1.0) to still auto_merge; tighter thresholds would route to human_review

name: existing_model_null_embedding_blocked_by_schema
intent: The schema's NOT NULL constraint on `embedding` blocks any path that would write a Model with no embedding — this scenario verifies the schema, not the reconciler

actual.error:
NotNullViolationError: null value in column "embedding" of relation "models" violates not-null constraint
DETAIL:  Failing row contains (019e0ba0-4279-7001-b8fd-d1f3ec7fbb11, 019e0ba0-4271-7003-9258-c9bb39381514, 019e0ba0-427d-7000-9e0c-9e5d93826ce1, {"kind": "state", "subject": "null-emb canonical"}, null-emb canonical, null, {019e0ba0-4271-7004-aa83-b263ac474ee4}, [], {"valid_from": "2026-05-09T07:25:12.703986+00:00", "valid_until"..., 0.6, 0.5, null, [], t, {}, {}, 0.5, active, null, null, 2026-05-09 13:10:12.692954+05:45, null, 0, null, null, {}, t, state, 0, 0, null, 0.6, null, null, 1, null, null).

name: shared_kind_different_content
intent: Two different state propositions on the same scope must both persist (no_match) — the kind-match alone is insufficient

name: no_match_audit_row_written
intent: With log_no_match=True (default), a no_match decision still writes 1 audit row for tuning data

name: auto_merge_does_not_reset_activation
intent: auto_merge UPDATE only changes confidence; activation must NOT regress

name: prediction_deadline_future_inconclusive
intent: prediction_deadline whose evaluate_at is in the future must evaluate to 'inconclusive' (the deadline hasn't fired)

name: prediction_deadline_past_check_satisfied
intent: A prediction_deadline past its evaluate_at, with the check satisfied, evaluates to 'confirmed'

name: resource_threshold_adequacy
intent: resource_threshold passes adequacy with both ref+threshold; fails with either missing — kind not exercised by existing harness

name: observation_pattern_direction_confirms
intent: observation_pattern with direction='confirms' and a matching observation in window evaluates as 'confirmed' (not 'violated')

name: explicit_contestation_partial_match
intent: explicit_contestation with 2 required actors and only 1 actually contesting — should be 'inconclusive' (not yet violated; still possible the second actor will contest)

name: weak_falsifier_passes_minimal_adequacy
intent: A 21-char pattern + 1-year window passes adequacy but is weak — adequacy floor doesn't catch low-quality falsifiers

name: parser_long_and_compound_windows
intent: parse_within_window handles long horizons (10Y, P5Y) and compound forms (P1W2DT3H) — these are valid ISO-8601

name: falsifier_kind_none_or_wrong_type
intent: None / empty dict / non-dict input return (False, reason) with no exception

wrong_type: falsifier must be dict; got str

name: multiple_kinds_in_one_falsifier
intent: A falsifier whose kind is a list of two values must NOT pass adequacy; either clean reject or loud raise is OK

actual.error: TypeError: cannot use 'list' as a set element (unhashable type: 'list')

name: self_referential_commitment_outcome
intent: A Model whose commitment_outcome references its own commitment, with the commitment NOT in any contradicting state, evaluates as 'inconclusive' (the falsifier never actually fires)

name: negative_or_zero_window_rejected
intent: P-1D, -7 days, P0Y0M0W0D all raise MalformedFalsifierError

name: wide_fanout_unblocks_20_dependents
intent: One doneverified commitment unblocks 20 dependents in single cascade walk; depth bound is not breached

name: long_dependency_chain_stops_at_unblock
intent: Deep depends-on chain where only the head is done: cascade unblocks chain[1] but stops there (active doesn't trigger further cascades)

name: dependency_cycle_terminates_via_visited_dedup
intent: A↔B mutual depends_on cycle: cascade terminates via visited dedup, not via depth bound

name: cascade_against_missing_entity
intent: Cascade seeded by a non-existent commitment id completes cleanly (no downstream, no crash)

name: decision_revisit_then_commit_unblock
intent: A commitment that is both flagged-for-review (branch B) and an unblock target (branch A) reaches state='active' after the second cascade

name: cascade_noop_no_dependents
intent: A done commit with no dependents/no contributes_to to non-critical goals produces a 1-step cascade (just the seed)

name: critical_path_doneverify_recomputes_goal_health
intent: Commit doneverify on a critical-path edge triggers a goal_health recompute (branch A sub-task)

name: decision_revisited_without_observation_id
intent: decision_revisited with observation_id=None completes cleanly (the branch only flags; no transition is required)

name: empty_scope_model_does_not_break_cascade
intent: A Model with no scope_actors/scope_entities does not interfere with cascade on unrelated entities

name: depth_bound_at_max_minus_one_no_violation
intent: With max_depth=MAX-1 on a chain that converges at depth 1, bound_violated stays False — bound check uses '>=' correctly

name: five_parallel_identical_inserts_collapse_to_one
intent: 5 coroutines firing identical inserts into one tenant + scope produce 1 Model (region lock + reconcile serialize)

name: ten_parallel_inserts_independent_actors
intent: 10 inserts to 10 distinct actor scopes (no contention) all succeed and all 10 Models survive

name: overlapping_region_locks_serialize
intent: 4 parallel inserts on overlapping scopes ([A], [A], [B], [A,B]) all succeed; region lock ordering doesn't deadlock

name: five_parallel_cascades_on_shared_goal
intent: 5 cascades all touching the same goal complete without deadlock or duplicate goal-health updates

name: parallel_reconcile_candidates_first_wins
intent: Of 5 parallel identical inserts, exactly 1 wins the no_match decision; the other 4 see auto_merge

name: five_parallel_contestations_serialize
intent: 5 actors contesting the same Model in parallel: all succeed, contested_count reflects the actual count

name: parallel_archives_idempotent
intent: 5 parallel archive ops on the same Model: final status is archived; archive_reason is consistent

name: parallel_trigger_id_idempotency
intent: 5 parallel applies of the same trigger_id: exactly one wins, four raise AlreadyAppliedError

name: pool_exhaustion_does_not_crash
intent: 30 concurrent applies against a max-size-20 pool all complete (asyncpg queues acquires, no crash, no timeout)

name: permuted_scope_holds_same_region_lock
intent: scope=[A,B] and scope=[B,A] hash to the same region lock; two parallel inserts of identical text fold to 1 Model

name: llm_timeout_fails_loudly
intent: A timeout raised by the LLM provider must NOT result in think() returning status='success' — fail loud or surface as failed status

actual.error: ReasoningFailure: llm_reason exhausted 3 attempts: synthetic LLM timeout

name: llm_malformed_json_rejected
intent: LLM returns garbage JSON; think() does not crash and either retries or surfaces a validation failure status

actual.error: ReasoningFailure: LLM output failed to parse after provider retries: LLM output did not validate after 1 attempts: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

name: llm_empty_response
intent: LLM returns '' — think() handles cleanly (retry, fail, or skip), does not produce phantom Models

actual.error: ReasoningFailure: LLM output failed to parse after provider retries: LLM output did not validate after 1 attempts: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

name: llm_valid_json_wrong_schema
intent: LLM returns parseable JSON that doesn't match RawDiff schema; think() rejects loudly

actual.error:
ReasoningFailure: LLM output failed to parse after provider retries: LLM output did not validate after 1 attempts: 4 validation errors for RawDiff
trigger_ref
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'foo': 'bar', 'baz': 42}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing
tenant_id
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'foo': 'bar', 'baz': 42}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing
foo
  Extra inputs are not permitted [type=extra_forbidden, input_value='bar', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/extra_forbidden
baz
  Extra inputs are not permitted [type=extra_forbidden, input_value=42, input_type=int]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/extra_forbidden

name: llm_raises_handled_via_outcome
intent: LLM raises LLMError; think() returns failed-status outcome

actual.error: ReasoningFailure: llm_reason exhausted 3 attempts: synthetic LLM error

name: apply_on_closed_connection_raises
intent: apply_diff on a closed connection raises (no silent no-op or hang)

name: apply_diff_all_ops_malformed
intent: A diff with three malformed ops either raises OR returns a summary indicating zero successful applies — never phantom-applies a malformed op

name: reconciler_degrades_to_skipped_on_failure
intent: Reconciler internal exception (closed conn) demotes to decision='skipped' — never aborts the apply

name: cross_tenant_no_reconcile_leak
intent: Tenant 2's insert must NOT merge into Tenant 1's existing Model even with identical embed_seed — tenant_id is a hard isolation boundary

name: insert_without_embedding
intent: Insert with no embedding key in entry: applier either rejects OR uses a placeholder; reconciler skips cleanly

name: same_actor_name_distinct_tenants_distinct_locks
intent: Two tenants both with an actor named 'ACME' produce distinct region-lock keys (tenant_id is mixed into the hash)

name: shared_pool_codec_no_cross_tenant_leak
intent: A pool connection used by two tenants does not leak vector codec state — each tenant reads only their own rows

name: retrieval_does_not_leak_across_tenants
intent: A retrieval in tenant 2 with a vector matching tenant 1's Model returns ZERO leaked rows from tenant 1

name: reconciler_does_not_match_across_tenants
intent: A tenant 2 insert with tenant 1's embed_seed lands as a NEW tenant 2 Model (so t2_count = 2: pre-existing m2 + new); tenant 1's m1 is untouched (t1_count = 1)

name: tenant_cleanup_does_not_affect_other_tenants
intent: Archiving every Model in tenant 1 leaves tenant 2's Models intact

name: two_hundred_distinct_signals_invariant_audit
intent: 200 distinct-topic inserts into one tenant produce a consistent substrate: no NULL embeddings, no scope-less Models, full audit trail

name: random_walk_lifecycle_audit_intact
intent: 100 mixed insert/contest/archive ops leave the substrate consistent: no archived Models without reasons, error rate ≤ 5%

name: fifty_deep_supersession_chain
intent: 50-deep supersession chain ends with 1 active + 49 archived, all with reason='superseded'

name: reconciliation_drift_100_identical_inserts
intent: 100 identical inserts produce exactly 1 active Model (99 auto_merges + 1 no_match in the breakdown)

name: cascade_saturation_40_dependents
intent: A single doneverify cascade unblocks all 40 dependents without exceeding depth bound
